zh.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Cokefeld於1089年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親Lemmerus de Cokefield24歲，母親Hunna26歲。他與Adelicia de Criketot結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1166年在英國英格蘭享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Cokefeld was born in 1089, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lemmerus de Cokefield, was 24 and his mother, Hunna, was 26. He married Adelicia de Criketot. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1166, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Cokefeld est né en 1089, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lemmerus de Cokefield, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Hunna, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Adelicia de Criketot. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1166, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Cokefeld 1089 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lemmerus de Cokefield 24 und seine Mutter Hunna 26. Er hat Adelicia de Criketot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1166 im Alter von 78 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Cokefeld è nato il nel 1089 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lemmerus de Cokefield, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Hunna, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Adelicia de Criketot. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1166, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.Cokefeld, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Cokefeld(이)가 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lemmerus de Cokefield(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Hunna(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Adelicia de Criketot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 잉글랜드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Cokefeld nasceu em 1089, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lemmerus de Cokefield, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Hunna, tinha 26 anos. ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Cokefeld родился в 1089 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lemmerus de Cokefield было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Hunna, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelicia de Criketot. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1166 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
